title: Updated Time: General Mills to Webcast Force for Good Investor Event on May 4, 2022 at 8 a.m. CT
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--General Mills, Inc. (NYSE: GIS) will webcast an Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) investor event on May 4, 2022, including a pre-recorded presentation and a live question-and-answer session with management. The event will highlight the Force for Good pillar of the company's Accelerate strategy, focusing on the progress and commitments General Mills has made on its ambitious goals in the areas of planet, people, community and food, and how doing good drives

title: 7 Retirement Stocks to Buy to Sleep Soundly at Night
text: As the population ages, more people are looking for ways to save for retirement. This can be done by investing in retirement stocks.

title: General Mills Highlights Progress in 2022 Global Responsibility Report
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--General Mills released its 2022 Global Responsibility Report, highlighting progress made against environmental and social commitments in fiscal 2021.

title: 6 Consumer Defensive Stocks Gurus Are Putting in Their Easter Baskets
text: Ahead of Easter weekend celebrations, a Christian holiday that commemorates the death and resurrection of Jesus Christ, investors may be interested in companies that benefit from egg hunts and other festivities as high inflation, interest rates and the Russia-Ukraine conflict continue to affect markets.
